Control.name: ZO_LootAlphaContainerButtonDestroy
Control.OnInitialized: self:SetParent(ZO_LootAlphaContainer) ZO_KeybindButtonTemplate_Setup(self, "MSAL_DESTROY", function() MuchSmarterAutoLoot.Destroy(self) end, GetString(SI_LOOT_TAKE_ALL) .. " & " .. GetString(SI_ITEM_ACTION_DESTROY))

Control.name: ZO_LootAlphaContainerButtonJunking
Control.OnInitialized: self:SetParent(ZO_LootAlphaContainer) ZO_KeybindButtonTemplate_Setup(self, "MSAL_JUNKING", function() MuchSmarterAutoLoot.Junking(self) end, GetString(SI_LOOT_TAKE_ALL) .. " & " .. GetString(SI_ITEM_ACTION_MARK_AS_JUNK))
